transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: A few, uh, very bright particles or fragments or something that, uh, go drifting by as we maneuver.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I do understand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: There's a whole bunch of big ones on my window, then.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Just bright.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Looks like the 4th of July outruns, Wendell.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Yeah, and now you can see some of them in shape.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: They're very, uh, jagged, angular fragments or tumbling.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Right, they look like fluid or something, sir?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Not to me, they look like pieces or something, uh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Roger.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: They're very bright.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Jack, we'd like Omni, Charlie.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Well, you know, I don't know, there are a number of possibilities.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: If you had some kind of a, I got the impression maybe they were curved a little bit, as if

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: they might be off the side of the S-4B, and that's a wild guess.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay, RCS logic is...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Ice chunks, possibly, and maybe there's paint coming off of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Roger, I noticed on one trip up the elevator last week, one of the flags, I thought it

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: was in the S-2, but it might be on the S-4, it looked like it was peeling.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Maybe that's what you got.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: And the S-4B maneuver is complete.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: One minute.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay, we'll set the o'clock.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay, and with the maneuver complete, the fragment field is essentially static, except for a

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: very slight tumbling within the fragment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Roger, copy that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Every once in a while, a fragment of considerably higher velocity than the others goes across

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: my window, but that's very rare.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Roger.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay, that's that field of view I saw on my...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Jack, do you see it now?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Bob, at least there's no apparent relative motion between fragments.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I do understand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I'll take two pictures about a minute apart, if I can, and it'll be frame 70.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay, frame 70.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: And, Bob, it's Gino, my impression is that they are flat, flake-like particles, some maybe

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: six inches across.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: And, although there's no relative motion between the two, most of them seem to be twinkling.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: And I think, for the most part, they're all moving away from us.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I focus on finishing up a minute apart, of different directions.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: So you can say-

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I don't know, but they can say thank you for the most part.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: So you want to choose what we get here?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: I'm going to try to see it when seeing and then say I'm going to be 요즘 them.

text: So, I mean, it's too...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: How you do what I do, folks?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
text: So you got like a question.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721698 Dod 111721698
